title: Review Active Alarms On the Hospital HMI Alarms Screen
summary: Use the Hospital HMI Alarms screen to view the listed alarms and their associated time stamps, then record the entries exactly as displayed for comparison to the documented alarms and corrective actions table.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when alarm information needs to be reviewed directly on the Hospital HMI and the current alarm text and time stamps must be captured from the Alarms screen.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to infer alarm meaning beyond the displayed text and the documented alarms/faults table.
Do not use this procedure as a corrective action procedure; the supplied source only supports viewing and recording alarms with time stamps.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Access the Hospital HMI Alarms screen, review visible alarm entries, and record the alarm text and time stamps exactly as shown.

safety_notes: This runbook is limited to viewing and recording alarm information shown on the Hospital HMI.
Do not infer alarm meaning beyond the displayed text and the documented table.

system_preconditions: The Hospital HMI Alarms screen must be available for viewing.

visual_references.description: Hospital HMI Alarms screen showing the alarms list with associated time stamps.
Hospital HMI Main Menu showing that Alarms is an available access point on the hospital station HMI.

steps.title: Open the Hospital HMI Alarms screen
steps.purpose: Reach the screen that displays the alarm list and time stamps.
steps.instruction: Open or navigate to the Hospital HMI Alarms screen.
steps.expected_result: The Hospital HMI Alarms screen is displayed.
steps.healthy_condition: The Alarms screen is visible and shows the alarm list area.
steps.failure_condition: The Alarms screen cannot be reached or is not displayed.

actions.label: Navigate to alarms screen
actions.exact_action: Open or navigate to the Hospital HMI Alarms screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall Hospital HMI Alarms screen layout.
Main menu access point showing Alarms as an available hospital HMI function.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the Hospital HMI Alarms screen cannot be accessed from the available source-supported HMI views.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The Alarms screen provides a list of all alarms along with a time stamp.
The main menu allows access to Operator Menu, Maintenance Menu, and Alarms.

steps.title: Locate the displayed alarm list
steps.purpose: Identify the portion of the screen that contains the current alarm entries.
steps.instruction: Locate the list of alarms displayed on the screen.
steps.expected_result: The visible alarm entries can be identified on the Alarms screen.
steps.healthy_condition: A list of alarms is visible on the screen.
steps.failure_condition: No alarm list is visible or the displayed information cannot be read.

actions.label: Identify alarm list
actions.exact_action: Locate the list of alarms displayed on the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The alarms list area and the associated time stamp display.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the alarm list is not visible or cannot be read on the Hospital HMI Alarms screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The Alarms screen provides a list of all alarms along with a time stamp.

steps.title: Read each visible alarm and time stamp
steps.purpose: Capture the exact alarm text and associated time information shown on the HMI.
steps.instruction: For each visible alarm entry, read the alarm text and the associated time stamp.
steps.expected_result: Each visible alarm entry has been reviewed with its corresponding time stamp.
steps.healthy_condition: Alarm text and time stamp are both visible for each reviewed entry.
steps.failure_condition: Alarm text or time stamp is missing, unclear, or cannot be read for one or more visible entries.

actions.label: Read alarm entries
actions.exact_action: For each visible alarm entry, read the alarm text and the associated time stamp.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Each visible alarm entry and its associated time stamp.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the displayed alarm text or time stamp cannot be read clearly.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The Alarms screen provides a list of all alarms along with a time stamp.

steps.title: Record the alarm entries exactly as shown
steps.purpose: Preserve the displayed alarm evidence for later comparison to the documented alarm table.
steps.instruction: Record the alarm entries exactly as shown so they can be compared to the documented alarms/faults table.
steps.expected_result: A complete record of the visible alarm text and time stamps is created exactly as displayed.
steps.healthy_condition: Recorded entries match the visible HMI alarm text and time stamps without interpretation.
steps.failure_condition: Recorded entries are incomplete, paraphrased, or do not match the displayed HMI information.

actions.label: Document displayed alarms
actions.exact_action: Record the alarm entries exactly as shown so they can be compared to the documented alarms/faults table.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The displayed alarm text and time stamps that must be copied exactly.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop and correct the record if alarm text is being paraphrased instead of copied exactly as shown.
Escalate if the displayed information cannot be captured accurately.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The Alarms screen provides a list of all alarms along with a time stamp.
Table 4-23: Alarms and Corrective Actions includes columns for ID, Alarm Text, Cause, Controller Response, and Corrective Action.

steps.title: Match displayed alarm text to the documented alarm table when needed
steps.purpose: Use the exact displayed alarm text to identify the corresponding documented alarm entry in the source material.
steps.instruction: Use the displayed alarm text to identify the corresponding documented alarm entry in the alarms/faults list when needed.
steps.expected_result: The displayed alarm text is matched to a documented alarm entry when a corresponding table entry exists.
steps.healthy_condition: A documented alarm entry can be identified using the exact displayed alarm text.
steps.failure_condition: The displayed alarm text cannot be matched to a documented alarm entry using the provided source material.

actions.label: Compare to documented alarm table
actions.exact_action: Use the displayed alarm text to identify the corresponding documented alarm entry in the alarms/faults list when needed.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The exact displayed alarm text to compare against the documented alarms/faults table.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the HMI alarm text cannot be matched to a documented alarm entry using the provided source material.
Do not infer alarm meaning beyond the displayed text and the documented table.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Table 4-23: Alarms and Corrective Actions includes columns for ID, Alarm Text, Cause, Controller Response, and Corrective Action.
The Alarms screen provides a list of all alarms along with a time stamp.

success_criteria: The Hospital HMI Alarms screen is viewed successfully.
Visible alarm entries and their time stamps are read from the screen.
Alarm entries are recorded exactly as displayed.
Displayed alarm text can be compared to the documented alarms/faults table when needed.
healthy_conditions: The Alarms screen displays a list of alarms along with a time stamp.
Visible alarm text and time stamps are readable.
Recorded entries match the HMI display exactly.
failure_conditions: The Hospital HMI Alarms screen cannot be accessed or displayed.
The alarm list is not visible or cannot be read.
Alarm text or time stamps cannot be captured accurately.
Displayed alarm text cannot be matched to a documented alarm entry using the provided source material.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the HMI alarm text cannot be matched to a documented alarm entry using the provided source material.
Escalate if the Hospital HMI Alarms screen cannot be accessed or the alarm list cannot be read.
Do not infer alarm meaning beyond the displayed text and the documented table.

missing_details: The source does not provide exact navigation steps for reaching the Hospital HMI Alarms screen.
The source does not specify whether login or a particular access level is required to view the Alarms screen.
The source does not provide a time estimate for completing this review.
The source does not define what to do if additional alarm history beyond the visible list is needed.
